more.title: The Ghost of 2013: How Laws Crafted to Stop Mugabe Now Haunt President Mnangagwa
more.description: In 2013, Zimbabweans celebrated the birth of a new constitution, a document meticulously crafted to usher in an era of democratic accountability and, crucially, to prevent the recurrence of a Mugabe-style life presidency.
